subject: Son Goku in base form, advancing forward with one hand extended in a beckoning or pointing gesture
description: A humanoid figure strides forward confidently, one hand extended outward with fingers pointing or gesturing toward the viewer. The figure has dark spiky hair and wears an orange martial arts gi with dark trim. Behind the figure, warm red and orange energy streaks radiate outward with bright white highlights, suggesting motion and momentum. The composition is a mid-shot with the figure slightly foreshortened by the advancing pose. The expression is open and determined — an inviting or challenging energy rather than rage.
foreground: humanoid figure with dark spiky hair in orange martial arts gi, one hand extended forward, striding pose
background: warm red and orange energy streaks with bright highlights
emotion: open confidence, advancing challenge, spirited invitation
